test_title: BizAI and WhatsApp KB Content Validation

queries.query: What makes Gupshup's BizAI different from Meta's?
What are the BizAI API endpoints?
How do I onboard to BizAI?
What is BizAI and what does it do?
How do I use the WhatsApp API?
What is Meta Business Agent for WhatsApp?
How does BizAI integrate with WhatsApp?
Compare BizAI pricing with WhatsApp API pricing
What is the onboarding process for BizAI on WhatsApp?

bizai_module.notes: 5 out of 6 BizAI queries successfully retrieved kb/bizai/* content

whatsapp_module.notes: WhatsApp-specific new KB not being retrieved; falling back to existing kb/channels/* content

issues_found.issue: BizAI overview and architecture queries not answered
issues_found.description: 2 out of 6 BizAI queries returned 'I don't know' responses despite KB content existing
potential_causes: Embedding/search index may not include latest BizAI content
Similarity scoring too strict for these queries
KB chunks may need better tagging/indexing

issues_found.issue: New WhatsApp KB not being prioritized
issues_found.description: WhatsApp-specific queries retrieving kb/channels/* instead of new kb/whatsapp/* content
potential_causes: New kb/whatsapp/* chunks not in embedding index
kb/channels/* content scoring higher in similarity search
KB ingest pipeline may not have processed new files yet

issues_found.description: Answers provided have low confidence scores even when retrieved correctly
potential_causes: Rules-based scoring system may underweight new content
Confidence calculation may need tuning for new KB modules

recommendations.action: Re-index KB chunks with BizAI and WhatsApp content
recommendations.rationale: Some new content not being retrieved by similarity search

recommendations.action: Verify embedding index includes all kb/bizai/* and kb/whatsapp/* files
recommendations.rationale: New KB files may not be in search index yet
recommendations.estimated_effort: Low - check ingest logs, re-run if needed

recommendations.action: Tune confidence scoring for new KB modules
recommendations.rationale: Very low confidence scores impact user trust even when answers are correct

recommendations.action: Add explicit intent/topic tags to new KB chunks
recommendations.rationale: May improve retrieval for overview/definition questions
recommendations.estimated_effort: Low - update KB chunks YAML frontmatter

positive_findings: All 12 queries executed successfully and returned results
All 12 correlation_ids tracked and traces found in Langfuse
5/6 BizAI queries successfully retrieved kb/bizai/* content
Langfuse telemetry working perfectly - all traces captured with full metadata
Real traces queryable via Langfuse API with correlation_id tracking
next_steps: 1. Run KB ingest on kb/bizai/* and kb/whatsapp/* files to ensure embeddings are current
2. Monitor Langfuse dashboard to verify new traces with improved KB retrieval
3. Test BizAI overview and architecture queries again after re-indexing
4. Consider adding semantic tags/keywords to new KB chunks for better discoverability
5. Review and tune confidence scoring algorithm for new content types
